name: qa_agent
description: Placeholder — bulk document review against SOPs, manufacturer/MC charts, and quality rules: scoring, missing-info detection, analyst reports, audit history. Full architecture in docs/QA_AGENT_ROADMAP.md. Designed to plug into Flow as a module.

tools.name: review_document
tools.description: Review one document against SOP + chart rules; return score, failed checks, missing info.

tools.name: bulk_review
tools.description: Queue a batch of documents for review.

tools.name: chart_lookup
tools.description: Look up a manufacturer/MC chart entry.

tools.name: audit_history
tools.description: Review/audit history for a document set.
